name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W213/S213, C238/A238 (3.5L V6 petrol)

serviceNotes.engine oil: M276 V6 NA E 350 (pre-facelift W213): 15,000 km / 12 months EU ASSYST class; rec 10,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes-Benz maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Updated to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W213/W212 2.0 petrol Tier 2 proxy; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v20705-2017/service has no E 350 table).
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24-month renewal per Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual.
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Inspect each service; ~30,000 km planning reminder.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: 60,000 km / 48 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W212 2.0 petrol Tier 2 spark row as six-cylinder reference class).
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: V6 petrol: intake deposits less common than small DI turbos; address if rough running or codes suggest buildup.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (Tier 2 W212 2.0 petrol proxy for W213 M276 Oil Service spacing)
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz W213; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W213
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness check ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W213 inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate)
serviceSources.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-Benz W213 M276 service manual maintenance table (engine coolant); time cap per platform coolant rule
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: Port-injection-biased V6 — carbon cleaning ~120,000 km when symptoms warrant — specialist practice
